market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: 神祕天體 1998 SH2 軌道異常之謎解開，科學家首次直擊暗彗星活動
articles.description: 天文學家通常藉由「彗髮」與「彗尾」來辨識彗星。當太陽加熱冰層，氣體逸出時會產生微小的推力，常常導致彗星路徑發生 […]

articles.title: Your backstage pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 is waiting
articles.description: Volunteer at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get a behind-the-scenes look at how one of the world's biggest startup conferences gets built.

articles.title: Uniswap pushes deeper into tokenized assets with permissioned trading pools
articles.description: The framework, developed with Superstate, Securitize and Dowgo, lets regulated funds and securities trade on Uniswap while enforcing compliance rules necessary for institutions.

articles.title: Ford bets on Apple for its next-generation of EVs
articles.description: Ford is the first automaker to use a new set of developer tools that will let it embed Apple Maps navigation and mapping directly into its vehicles' infotainment systems.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs Clarity Act despite banking industry's concerns over stablecoin rules
articles.description: The Goldman Sachs CEO said the crypto market structure bill would create a more stable regulatory framework, breaking with other major bank leaders who oppose key stablecoin provisions.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Fears of AI-driven DeFi hack epidemic overstated for now — but not for long
articles.description: Are the fears of an AI driven hacking epidemic totally overblown, or is this just the lull before the storm?

articles.title: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network
articles.description: A consortium led by Strategy and BlackRock has pledged $15 million to secure the Bitcoin network from the threat of a quantum computing breakthrough.

articles.title: The KIDS Act is way worse than digital carding — it is a mass surveillance system
articles.description: The fact that lawmakers are even contemplating a bill that would create a surveillance and censorship regime should be a wake-up call for everyone who values privacy and free expression, argues Electronic Frontier Foundation's India McKinney.

articles.title: Binance joins STOP THE TRAFFIK in anti-human trafficking effort
articles.description: The partnership expands Binance’s compliance efforts by providing intelligence and training to help detect cryptocurrency activity tied to human trafficking and child exploitation.

articles.title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy in a new group pledging $15 million to prepare Bitcoin for quantum threats
articles.description: Members will direct funding independently, with the consortium taking no role in Bitcoin governance or protocol decisions.

articles.title: BitMEX token crashes 90% as exchange announces shutdown
articles.description: BitMEX’s BMEX token plunged about 90% after the exchange announced plans to shut down, ending nearly 12 years in business as its Bitcoin futures market share shrank.

articles.title: Bitget secures license for New Zealand expansion
articles.description: Crypto exchange Bitget said it was registered as a financial service provider with New Zealand’s financial regulator, enabling it to expand its services in the country.

articles.title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
articles.description: The sovereign wealth-backed asset manager tapped KAIO to bring one of its private market funds onchain across Base, Solana and Sui networks.

articles.title: Polymarket to challenge France’s nationwide website block
articles.description: France’s regulator has said the platform still promoted illegal gambling and cited loss, identity-check and market-manipulation risks.

articles.title: Bernstein says Bitcoin mining deals necessary for AI power crunch
articles.description: Bernstein analysts remain bullish on the Bitcoin mining sector, as deals with third-party providers will be necessary to address the computing power limits of AI data centers.

articles.title: HYPE falls as crypto funds queue nearly $150M in locked tokens for withdrawal
articles.description: HYPE briefly fell 8% from its local highs as Multicoin Capital, Selini Capital and Galaxy Digital queued nearly $150 million of the token for withdrawals.

articles.title: Bulls face a test unlike anything in bitcoin's 17-year history
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 23, 2026

articles.title: Kazakhstan approves strategic crypto mining rules tied to national reserve
articles.description: Kazakhstan plans to require miners to meet strict infrastructure standards and transfer part of their mined crypto assets to a state-backed reserve under new rules.

articles.title: Bitcoin will get ‘lift’ from Hyperliquid, Robinhood in next crypto bull market: Bitwise exec
articles.description: Bitwise predicted that Hyperliquid and Robinhood TradFi ventures should form the basis for a crypto bull-market comeback that would lift Bitcoin and Ether.
